sentences.arabic: الْبَرْمَجَةُ هِيَ لُغَةُ الْمُسْتَقْبَلِ لِلْأَطْفَالِ وَالْكِبَارِ فِي كُلِّ مَكَانٍ.
sentences.translation: Programiranje je jezik budućnosti za djecu i odrasle svuda.
sentences.translationEn: Programming is the language of the future for children and adults everywhere.

sentences.arabic: يَتَعَلَّمُ كَثِيرٌ مِنَ الطُّلَّابِ كَيْفِيَّةَ بِنَاءِ الْمَوَاقِعِ وَالتَّطْبِيقَاتِ الْجَدِيدَةِ.
sentences.translation: Mnogi učenici uče kako da naprave nove web stranice i aplikacije.
sentences.translationEn: Many students learn how to build new websites and applications.

sentences.arabic: تُسَاعِدُ هَذِهِ الْمَهَارَةُ فِي حَلِّ الْمُشْكِلَاتِ بِطُرُقٍ مُبْدِعَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Ova vještina pomaže u rješavanju problema na kreativan način.
sentences.translationEn: This skill helps in solving problems in creative ways.
